mnemonics: CIA (Continuous Internal Assessment) uses DATA (Data Structures) to ANALYZE (Applications) student performance.
keyPoints: The evaluation focuses on application-based questions using data structures.
It assesses the practical implementation of algorithms and structures like trees, graphs, and hash tables.
The goal is to measure understanding of real-world problem-solving with data structures.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on theory and neglecting practical coding implementation.
Confusing the applications of different data structures (e.g., using a stack for a FIFO problem).
Not properly analyzing time/space complexity for the chosen data structure solution.
